title: Helix CLI Ticket Resolution, Help, JSON Output & Inspect Ergonomics
description: Tour of the changes to improve ticket lookup, help handling, JSON output, and inspection ergonomics in the Helix CLI.

steps.title: New isHelpRequested utility
steps.description: Added shared help-check function used by all routers and commands to detect --help/-h before any validation or API calls.

steps.title: extractTicketRef: Parse ticket reference from args
steps.description: Replaces the duplicated resolveTicketId() functions. Extracts raw ticket reference from --ticket flag, HELIX_TICKET_ID env var, or first positional arg.

steps.title: matchTicket: Pure ticket matching logic
steps.description: Core matching function (primary test target). Match priority: exact ID > case-insensitive short ID > numeric suffix. Returns null for ambiguous matches.

steps.title: resolveTicket: API-backed resolution
steps.description: Fetches ticket list from GET /api/tickets, calls matchTicket, and returns {id, shortId}. Error messages include the input reference and org context.

steps.title: configOrHelp: Auth-free help support
steps.description: Key deviation from plan: requireConfig() runs before routers, so help would fail without auth. configOrHelp() provides a stub config for help-only invocations.

steps.title: Global --help/-h case in main switch
steps.description: Added explicit --help/-h cases that call usage(0) for a clean exit. The usage() function now accepts an optional exit code parameter.

steps.title: Router-level help check
steps.description: Shows parent tickets usage when subcommand is --help/-h or missing. Uses direct comparison (not isHelpRequested(args)) so per-command help isn't intercepted.

steps.title: tickets get: Shared resolver + --json
steps.description: Resolves ticket reference via shared resolver, passes rest args to cmdTicketsGet for --json flag detection.

steps.title: formatDate: Safe timestamp rendering
steps.description: Validates Date objects before rendering. Handles null/undefined completedAt based on run status (in progress vs N/A). Fixes the Invalid Date bug.

steps.title: tickets get --json output
steps.description: JSON branch fetches ticket data and outputs full JSON with untruncated description. Text branch retains existing format with fixed timestamps.

steps.title: tickets list --json output
steps.description: JSON branch outputs the full items array as JSON. Text branch now includes abbreviated internal ID alongside short ID.

steps.title: continue: rawRef parameter for positional filtering
steps.description: New rawRef parameter fixes the positional[0] === ticketId comparison when the user passed '339' but ticketId was resolved to a CUID.

steps.title: Comments: Duplicate resolver eliminated
steps.description: Removed duplicate resolveTicketId(), imported shared resolver. Comments now support short ID and numeric ticket number resolution.

steps.title: inspect db: --query flag for PowerShell safety
steps.description: Added --query flag as alternative to positional SQL args. Avoids double-quote issues in PowerShell. Help text includes PowerShell-safe example.

steps.title: Unit tests: Resolver and extraction
steps.description: 24 tests covering matchTicket (ID, short ID, numeric, no match, ambiguity) and extractTicketRef (flag, env, positional, priority).

steps.title: Unit tests: Help detection and flags
steps.description: 6 tests for isHelpRequested plus additional tests for hasFlag, getFlag, and getPositionalArgs.
